description:
📌 Free template & guide: https://www.oleg.ae/claude-b2b-outreach

I built a full B2B outreach system in Claude Code that finds the right leads on LinkedIn, scores them from 1-10 based on custom criteria, and generates hyper-personalized messages with real value attached — not generic pitches. For each prospect, it creates an improved version of their banner, profile picture, and headline they can use right away. This system is getting a 35% response rate.

In this video I walk through every step — from lead discovery and scoring to generating personalized deliverables that make people actually want to reply. If you're doing any kind of B2B sales or cold outreach, this is the most effective system I've found.

👋🏻 My socials
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/olegai
Instagram: https://instagram.com/melnikoff_oleg

Timestamps
0:00 - Intro
2:12 - How to find leads
6:14 - How to score leads
9:14 - Cold outreach messages
